== Notes for [[Item:Q104163|Q104163]] ==

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=53943

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=53478

http://studylib.es/doc/6310665/los-burgaleses-en-las-ordems-nobiliarias-espa%C3%B1olas

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000081066681959

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
